title: Greek Lamb Skewers
description: A flavorful and healthy Greek-inspired lamb skewer recipe that's perfect for a quick weeknight dinner. Marinate the lamb in a mixture of Mediterranean spices, olive oil, and lemon juice for a deliciously moist and tender result.

ingredients.name: Mediterranean
ingredients.notes: Available in a pre-mixed spice blend or create your own

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality, extra-virgin olive oil

ingredients.name: Skewers
ingredients.notes: Soak in water for 30 minutes before use

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together Mediterranean spice blend, olive oil, and lemon juice.
Add lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread lamb onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until lamb reaches an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
Let skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
